title: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Men - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Men 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth nsitional Housing/Shelter AIDS/HIV Crime Victims Disabilities Issues Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER MEN'S CONNECT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connect is a 3-6-month program providing men the opportunity to stabilize from street life, form supportive relationships within a clean and sober environment, receive job readiness and life skills training, and support for housing and employment searches. 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are experiencing houselessness. Must be medically stable, pass a urinalysis, be able to navigate stairs, and actively participate in the program. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday at 11am Email (503) 980-4998 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER TRANSITONAL HOUSING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 40 room transitional housing program. Restrooms and showers are shared. Residents must attend a weekly chapel service. Rooms can be rented for an indefinite time. 526 SE Lane Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: -Men age 18 and older -Must pass a urinalysis for drug use -Agree to follow program rules -Participant in New Life Program or Emergency Men's Shelter program Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-2:30pm Transitional housing curfew: 7 days per week 10pm Email (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS CLARK CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 90-bed short-term, transitional housing residential program. Offers case management, life and job skills training, support services, and reserves beds for men involved in the Multnomah County community justice system. Stays typically last 4-6 months. Beds at a shelter are not guaranteed. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are experiencing homelessness. Abstinence from alcohol and drugs is expected of residents; random breathalyzer and urinalysis testing is conducted. Hours: Residential Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS DOREEN'S PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 90-bed short-term, transitional housing residential program. Provides case management, life and job skills training, and support services. Stays are generally 4-6 months long. Beds at a shelter are not guaranteed. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 18 and older single men and male veterans who are experiencing homelessness. Abstinence from alcohol and drugs is expected of residents; random breathalyzer and urinalysis testing is conducted. Hours: Residential Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION MEN'S CONNECT PROGRAM ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION TRANSITONAL HOUSING PROGRAM TRANSITION PROJECTS CLARK CENTER
